signals.reasoning: Cover the live short immediately. The trade has fully round-tripped from a meaningful winner to a live loss, retained none of peak P&L, and the short is now fighting positive funding with only about 4.4% liquidation distance.
Cover the live short. It is still green, but it has already given back more than half of peak P&L, the warning is urgent, and the tape is still trend-supported on the long side.
BTC remains stable-to-firm, but under veto there is no need to force a fresh trade.
ETH still has trend-supported strength, but the event brake keeps it watch-only.
SOL still looks more like a short-covering bounce than a clean continuation trade in either direction.
The squeeze mechanics are strong, but liquidity and spread quality are too poor to trust under veto.
TON is extended enough to avoid chasing, but not crowded enough to make it a great fresh short here.
ALT is too thin and too noisy for a serious fresh position in this regime.
